name: vantage-skills
description: Vantage agent-skills: the orchestrator engine, its specialist sub-agents, and the portable optimizer.

plugins.name: vantage-orchestrator
plugins.description: Venture-agnostic orchestrator engine. Plans a mission into a wave-based DAG and resolves each slice through a tiered agent ladder: reuse a core agent (researcher, ideation, implementation, validator, auditor, optimizer), reuse a bundled or previously-synthesized specialist, or synthesize a new one hyper-focused on the ask and persist it for reuse. Deploys sub-agents in parallel, gates each wave through the auditor, and runs autonomously under configurable autonomy and external-authority dials with run-budget stop conditions and a non-negotiable safety floor. Ships a commerce pack (website-build, frontend-tester) and a portable optimizer skill.
